title: The Coffee Shop Bookmark
narration:
I leave my book behind every Tuesday on purpose.

The café cat is tucked inside the bookmark. The next week, the drawing has a reply.

My notes grow longer each visit. The barista writes: 'You're twenty pages ahead of me.'

Today, I walk up to the counter. He slides my coffee over.

A bookmark sits on the saucer, featuring a perfect sketch of my own face.
